description_long: This is a small, three-legged stool with a smooth, rounded triangular seat finished in a light gray or white color. The seat is slightly curved and appears to be made of a solid, hard material, likely painted or laminated wood. The three legs are splayed outward for stability and are constructed from a medium-toned wood, giving a natural and sturdy appearance. The legs are attached directly to the underside of the seat without any visible fasteners or decorative elements. The overall design is simple and functional, with a minimalist aesthetic that would suit modern urban environments such as parks, cafes, or public waiting areas. The stool is compact and lightweight, making it easy to move and reposition as needed.
description: A compact, three-legged stool with a smooth, light-colored triangular seat and natural wood legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: The stool is seen from an angle showing the broadest part of the seat and all three splayed wooden legs.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front edge of the seat and two of the legs, with the third leg partially visible behind.
description_view_2: The seat appears more symmetrical, with two legs clearly visible and the third leg mostly hidden.
description_view_3: The stool is viewed from the opposite side, showing the narrowest point of the seat and all three legs in a staggered arrangement.
